polymarket.fee_note: Most markets 0% fee. 15-min crypto markets up to 3%. US DCM 0.10%

kalshi.note: Enable when Kalshi API access is set up

paper_trading.note: Paper trading mode. Set enabled=false and add real credentials to go live.

themes.note: No live bot exists yet. This config defines the strategy focus areas for future bot implementation. Based on Polymarket research (task 20260306101748-a769b108). Current infrastructure: crypto_wallet.py monitors incoming payments only.

themes.name: Housing Market / Bond Yields / Geopolitical War Pressure
themes.description: Housing market opportunities driven by geopolitical conflict, rising bond yields, and mortgage rate stress. War pressure in Europe (Ukraine, potential NATO escalation) drives capital flows into USD, pushes 10Y/30Y Treasury yields up, increases mortgage rates, and suppresses housing affordability. This creates directional opportunities across homebuilder equities, housing ETFs, REITs, and mortgage-backed instruments.

macro_signals.note: Inverted yield curve signals recession risk, accelerates REIT selloffs
War pressure strengthens USD, weakens EUR-denominated assets
High VIX correlates with risk-off rotation, REIT weakness

housing_etfs.name: SPDR S&P Homebuilders ETF
housing_etfs.play: short on yield spike above 4.5%, long on yield normalization

housing_etfs.name: iShares U.S. Home Construction ETF
housing_etfs.play: tracks homebuilder stocks directly, more concentrated than XHB

housing_etfs.name: Real Estate Select Sector SPDR Fund
housing_etfs.play: short REITs when 10Y yield exceeds dividend yield spread

homebuilder_stocks.name: Lennar Corporation
homebuilder_stocks.note: Largest US homebuilder by revenue, high sensitivity to mortgage rates

homebuilder_stocks.name: D.R. Horton
homebuilder_stocks.note: Largest US homebuilder by volume, entry-level focus increases affordability exposure

homebuilder_stocks.name: Toll Brothers
homebuilder_stocks.note: Luxury/move-up segment, less rate-sensitive than entry-level

reits.name: Realty Income
reits.play: rate-sensitive, short when yields rise above 5%

reits.name: Vanguard Real Estate ETF
reits.play: broad REIT exposure, reliable yield vs bond-yield spread indicator

defense_sector.name: iShares U.S. Aerospace & Defense ETF
defense_sector.play: long on geopolitical escalation, inversely correlated with housing

mortgage_instruments.name: iShares MBS ETF
mortgage_instruments.play: mortgage-backed securities ETF, falls when rates rise

signal_logic.entry_housing_short: 10Y yield > 4.5% AND VIX > 20 AND mortgage rate > 7.5%

data_sources: Yahoo Finance (yfinance library) for price data
NewsAPI or GDELT for geopolitical event detection
Polymarket prediction markets: war/ceasefire resolution markets for probability signals

themes.name: Mallorca / Balearic Islands Opportunity Strategy
themes.description: Opportunities in Mallorca and Balearic Islands real estate, tourism, and Spanish regional economic plays. Key drivers: luxury property demand from wealthy Germans and Northern Europeans, short-term rental regulation impact (Airbnb restrictions tightening since 2023), tourism recovery post-COVID, EUR strength/weakness effects on British/Nordic buyer demand, and Spanish REIT (Socimi) exposure to Balearic assets.

macro_signals.note: Stronger EUR makes Mallorca less attractive to non-EUR buyers (UK, US, Nordics)
GBP weakness reduces British buyer demand for Balearic property

macro_signals.name: TUI AG
macro_signals.note: Major European package tour operator, Mallorca is core destination

macro_signals.source: INE Spain (Instituto Nacional de Estadistica) - quarterly release

tourism_stocks.name: Melia Hotels International
tourism_stocks.play: major hotel operator in Mallorca and Balearic Islands, long on tourism recovery, short on regulation crackdowns

tourism_stocks.name: International Airlines Group (IAG)
tourism_stocks.play: parent of Iberia and Vueling, both key carriers to Mallorca; long on air travel volume increases
tourism_stocks.mallorca_exposure: indirect - route volume to PMI airport

tourism_stocks.name: TUI AG
tourism_stocks.play: dominant European tour operator, Mallorca is top destination; long on package holiday demand
tourism_stocks.mallorca_exposure: direct - largest foreign tour operator in Balearics

spanish_reits_socimis.name: Cellnex Telecom
spanish_reits_socimis.note: Infrastructure, not directly Balearic but major Spanish listed company

spanish_reits_socimis.name: Merlin Properties
spanish_reits_socimis.play: largest Spanish SOCIMI (REIT equivalent), diversified Spanish commercial RE
spanish_reits_socimis.note: SOCIMI = Sociedad Cotizada de Inversion en el Mercado Inmobiliario (Spanish REIT structure)

spanish_reits_socimis.name: Inmobiliaria Colonial
spanish_reits_socimis.play: prime office and residential SOCIMI, Spain + France exposure

luxury_real_estate_proxies.name: Knorr-Bremse (indirect German wealth proxy)
luxury_real_estate_proxies.note: German corporate wealth correlates with German buyer demand for Mallorca property

short_term_rental_restrictions.description: Balearic Islands Govern restricts tourist rental licenses (Llei Turistica). Each municipality has a cap. New licenses effectively frozen in most areas since 2022.
short_term_rental_restrictions.impact: Reduces Airbnb-style STR supply -> pushes demand toward hotels -> positive for Melia, TUI
short_term_rental_restrictions.monitor: Govern de les Illes Balears official announcements, local press (Diario de Mallorca)

construction_limits.description: Mallorca has moratoriums on new hotel construction in several municipalities (Palma, Calvia, Llucmajor).
construction_limits.impact: Supply constraint -> existing hotel operators benefit -> Melia long thesis

signal_logic.entry_tourism_long: EUR/GBP < 0.85 AND European summer travel bookings up YoY AND regulation tightening confirmed
signal_logic.exit_tourism_long: EUR/GBP > 0.90 OR major geopolitical event disrupting European travel
signal_logic.entry_socimi_long: Spanish 10Y yield < 3.5% AND tourism season outlook positive
signal_logic.exit_socimi_long: Spanish bond spread over German bund > 200bp (sovereign stress)
property_market_watch: Mallorca luxury property index (Engel & Volkers quarterly reports)
German buyer appetite signals (DAX performance as wealth proxy)
UK buyer appetite signals (GBP strength, UK consumer confidence)

data_sources: Yahoo Finance (yfinance) for MEL.MC, IAG.L, TUI1.DE, MRLB.MC tickers
BME (Bolsas y Mercados Espanoles) for Spanish equities: www.bolsasymercados.es
Govern Illes Balears official news for regulation signals
Diario de Mallorca / Ultima Hora for local market intelligence
INE Spain for national property price index
Engel & Volkers luxury market reports (quarterly, Mallorca specific)

risk_management.correlation_limit: no more than 3 highly correlated positions simultaneously
risk_management.currency_hedging: EUR/USD positions should be considered when holding EUR-denominated assets

implementation_notes.current_status: STRATEGY CONFIG ONLY - no live bot exists
next_steps: 1. Select broker API (Alpaca for US equities, IBKR for EU equities)
2. Implement data pipeline using yfinance for price signals
3. Add FRED API integration for macro rate data
4. Build signal evaluator against entry/exit logic above
5. Paper trade for minimum 4 weeks before going live
6. Start with housing theme (US equities, simpler infrastructure)
7. Add Mallorca theme after housing theme is validated (requires EU broker access)

rate_differentials.description: GB rate (3.7301%) minus EU rate (2.0%) = 1.73pp differential
US rate (3.64%) minus EU rate (2.0%) = 1.64pp differential
GB rate (3.7301%) minus US rate (3.64%) = 0.09pp differential. Narrow spread reduces carry trade incentive
